message:
Fix multiple security and reliability bugs in sync and import

Security fixes:
- SSH: Remove InsecureIgnoreHostKey fallback, fail secure on known_hosts errors
- Bundle: Add zip bomb protection with 100MB per-file size limit
- Sync: Add port validation (1-65535 range) in sync add command

Reliability fixes:
- Queue processing: Fix to retry only specific failed machine instead of all
- Import: Make copyProfileDirectory atomic using temp directory + rename pattern
  to prevent data loss on copy failure

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
